title: Claw Job
description: Describes a single task run job created by run_task.sh. Consumed by execute_job.py and the queue worker.

run_id.description: Sequential run identifier within a project-date partition, e.g. RUN-0001.

run_path.description: Relative path from project root to the run directory, e.g. runs/2024-03-12/RUN-0001.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the job was created.

project.description: Project slug — must match the project directory name.

preferred_agent.description: Agent key from agents.yaml, e.g. codex or claude.

id.description: Task identifier from the task file front matter.

source_path.description: Relative path from project root to the original task file.

copied_path.description: Filename of the task copy inside the run directory.

needs_review.description: Whether this task explicitly requests human or reviewer-agent review.

source_path.description: Relative path from project root to the original spec file.

copied_path.description: Filename of the spec copy inside the run directory.
